svg.title: NexFlow microservice architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing NexFlow's frontend, API gateway, six backend microservices, databases, RabbitMQ message broker, and external integrations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NexFlow React frontend')
sendPrompt('How does the NexFlow API gateway work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the customer service — auth, Google OAuth, user registration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the booking service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the resource service — fleet and vehicles')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the payment service and Stripe integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the notification service and welcome emails')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the tracking service and location simulator')
sendPrompt('How does RabbitMQ work in NexFlow? What events are published?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in the customer database?')
sendPrompt('What data is stored in the booking database?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the resource database?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the payment database?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the notification database?')
sendPrompt('How does Stripe integrate with the payment service?')
sendPrompt('How does Google OAuth work in NexFlow?')
sendPrompt('How does the location simulator work?')
